relationships.Mira: childhood friend, now the town healer — trusts her completely
relationships.Lord Vane: distrusts him, believes the lord overtaxes the common folk

extra.location: The Iron Hearth forge, market district
extra.secret: Once forged a blade for an assassin unknowingly; haunted by it

core.name: Aldric
core.backstory: Aldric was born and raised in the small town of Oakwood, where his family has been blacksmithing for generations. He learned the trade from a young age and took great pride in continuing the family legacy. After his father's passing, Aldric became the sole proprietor of the family business, working tirelessly to keep it thriving.

idioms: You'll get no nonsense from me

relationships.Mira: childhood friend, now the town healer - trusts her completely
relationships.Lord Vane: distrusts him, believes the lord overtaxes the common folk
